nasb.text: For everyone who asks, receives; and he who seeks, finds; and to him who knocks, it will be opened.

esv.text: For everyone who asks receives, and the one who seeks finds, and to the one who knocks it will be opened.

cnv.text: 因為所有祈求的就得著，尋找的就尋見，叩門的就給他開門。

ccb.text: 因为凡祈求的，就得到；寻找的，就寻见；叩门的，就给他开门。

csbs.text: 因为凡祈求的，就得到；寻找的，就找到；敲门的，就为他开门。
